regions.text: First units of measure came from bodies: a thumb is about an inch, and a foot is about twelve inches.
A long step is about three feet or one yard. Stepping is the simplest way to measure short distances.
Measuring lets us build rooms of specific sizes, like twenty feet long, sixteen wide, and twelve high.
volume: cubic space. shape: outline. All circles are the same shape, but not all triangles. FUTURE: will step. PRESENT: step(s). PAST: stepped.
